stemHtml:
Approaching Otopeni, you receive the following ATIS. What is the additional operational information contained in this broadcast?

''OTOPENI INFORMATION OSCAR. TIME 12:50. EXPECT AN ILS APPROACH. ARRIVALS RUNWAY 08 LEFT. DEPARTURES RUNWAY 08 RIGHT...''

options.b: WORK IN PROGRESS ON APRON TWO.
options.d: ARRIVALS RUNWAY 08 LEFT, DEPARTURES RUNWAY 08 RIGHT.
